note: No video bundler configured. Set EXTERNAL_VIDEO_WEBHOOK for production or BUNDLE_PROVIDER=ffmpeg (plus `npm i ffmpeg-static fluent-ffmpeg`) for local dev.
title: 7,000 Men in 20 Minutes
hook: In twenty minutes, seven thousand soldiers were dead.
script: June 11, 1864. General Grant ordered a frontal assault at Cold Harbor, Virginia. Confederate soldiers were dug in, rifles loaded. The order was given. Across a mile of open field, Union soldiers charged. Twenty minutes later, seven thousand of them were dead or dying. Some wounded men pinned in no-man's-land screamed for days. Grant called it the one mistake he truly regretted.
